backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a crochet shop, with data types and CRUD operations for products, orders, custom order requests, return requests, and newsletter subscribers, protected by an admin passcode.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (routing, visual theme, homepage sections, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing the purpose and notable implementation details of each component or page.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the layout in CartProvider, and shows a LoadingScreen for 2.2 seconds on initial load.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminCusto: Admin component that fetches and displays custom order requests in a responsive grid, showing details like product type, color, size, budget, email, description, and an optional inspiration image.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminOrder: Admin component that lists all orders with customer info, items, and totals, and allows updating each order's status via a dropdown select with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminProdu: Admin component for full product CRUD, including a reusable ProductForm with image upload/preview, and actions to create, edit, or delete products with bestseller toggling.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRetur: Admin component that fetches and displays return requests in a list, showing order ID, email, reason badge, date, and description for each request.
Slide-in cart drawer component that shows cart items, total, and buttons to proceed to checkout or view the full cart page, with body scroll locking while open.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItem.ts: Individual cart item row displaying product image, title, unit price, a quantity selector, line total, and a remove button using cart context actions.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderSu: Read-only checkout sidebar that lists cart items with images and quantities, then shows subtotal, free shipping, and the final total.
frontend/src/components/home/AboutSectio: Home page 'Our Story' section with a parallax-style background image, fade-in animation on scroll via IntersectionObserver, and brand copy about knotankey.
frontend/src/components/home/BestSellers: Displays a 'Best Sellers' section on the home page by fetching products, filtering for bestsellers, and rendering up to 4 ProductCards with skeleton loading states and scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/home/CTABanner.t: A call-to-action banner section with a headline and a link to the products page, featuring a scroll-triggered scale/fade-in animation via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/home/FloatingYar: Renders a canvas-based animation of softly drifting radial gradient orbs to create a subtle floating yarn visual effect as a background overlay.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: Full-screen hero section with a parallax background image, floating yarn canvas animation, staggered fade-in text/CTA, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand info, social links, shop/policy navigation links, contact email, and an embedded newsletter signup form.
frontend/src/components/layout/MusicTogg: A toggle button that plays or pauses looping background music using an HTML Audio element, displaying animated icons to reflect the current state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links with active underline indicators, a cart icon with item count badge, music toggle, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: A small email subscription form that validates input and calls the newsletter subscription mutation, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading overlay displaying an animated SVG yarn ball, the 'knotankey' brand name, and a bouncing dots indicator shown during initial app load.
frontend/src/components/product-detail/Q: A controlled quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons, enforcing configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component displaying a product image with bestseller badge, title, category, price, a quick-add-to-cart button, and a view-product link.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals, item count) with add, update, remove, and clear operations, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity state and status via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to return a boolean indicating whether a referenced element has become visible in the viewport, disconnecting after first intersection.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductFilters.ts: Custom hook that filters and sorts a list of products based on category, price range, bestseller flag, and sort order using memoization.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including products, orders, custom order requests, and return requests, using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines a soft luxury beige/cream CSS variable theme for light and dark modes, and declares custom keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with passcode-gated access that renders tabs for managing products, orders, custom orders, and return requests after authentication.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the shopping cart with a list of CartItem components and an order summary sidebar showing totals, with navigation to checkout or back to products when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Renders a checkout form collecting customer shipping info, validates inputs, builds an Order object, and submits it via the createOrder mutation, with a noted Stripe integration point for future payment processing.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Provides a custom order request form with fields for product type, color, size, description, budget, email, and an optional inspiration image upload, submitting the data as a CustomOrderRequest via a mutation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the home page by rendering the HeroSection, BestSellersSection, AboutSection, and CTABanner components in sequence.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Fetches and displays a single product's details (image, title, price, description) with quantity selection and add-to-cart or buy-now actions, showing skeletons while loading and an error state if not found.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Lists all products with a filterable, sortable interface supporting category, price range, bestseller toggle, and sort order, rendering ProductCard components in a grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnsPage.tsx: Returns & Exchanges page that displays the return policy in a grid layout and provides a form for submitting return requests, with validation and mutation via useCreateReturnRequest hook.
frontend/src/pages/ThankYouPage.tsx: Order confirmation page shown after successful checkout, displaying the order ID from URL search params along with next-steps messaging and navigation links back to home or products.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the soft-luxury design system including custom brand color tokens (cream, warm-brown/tan/sand), typography fonts (Playfair Display, DM Sans), shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) summarizing the knotankey e-commerce site's architecture, existing features, known issues, admin passcode, image requirements, and key design/implementation decisions.
